notes: - Image viewer particle options improved & fixed ZeroDivision crash affecting Bubbles
- Fixed & restored 'Autoplay on startup' option in Settings > General
• Added Shuffle Tracks + Album (5 shuffle modes total) + Added Repeat All (4 repeat modes total)
• Repeat modes now modify shuffle behavior & Shuffle tooltips update accordingly
• Super Shuffle + Repeat Off indexing fixed - no more repeats + stops queue end
• Basic Shuffle plays whole shuffle track list before proceding to next album
